meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement user onboarding to overcome debugging hurdles. A pro-level guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to build faster.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just about syntax; it's about context. By implementing structured user onboarding, you force yourself to define clear application states. This clarity allows tools like Claude Code and Antigravity to analyze your logic flow, transforming 'impossible' bugs into visible, solvable state discrepancies in your application architecture.
content.intro:
You’ve been staring at the screen for three hours. The console is a sea of red, your logic feels like a tangled web of spaghetti, and the frustration is starting to outweigh the thrill of the build. You aren't failing; you're just missing the architectural map that separates hobbyists from professional software engineers.

Great developers don't just write code; they build systems that guide users—and themselves—through complexity. By shifting your focus to user onboarding, you create a controlled environment where data flow becomes predictable. This isn't just about a welcome screen; it's about building a robust foundation that makes debugging a systematic process rather than a guessing game.

steps.title: Define the User Journey State
steps.description: Map out the exact sequence of states a user experiences during onboarding to isolate where logic failures occur.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current user onboarding flow and generate a state machine diagram that identifies potential failure points where debugging usually occurs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map out the onboarding state machine logic from src/components/onboarding'

steps.title: Implement Defensive State Handling
steps.description: Wrap your onboarding components in error boundaries to catch rendering crashes before they propagate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable ErrorBoundary component for my React onboarding flow that logs specific state data to the console for easier debugging.

steps.title: Automate Onboarding Traceability
steps.description: Inject telemetry into your onboarding flow so you can see exactly what data caused a failure in production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware pattern for my onboarding steps that logs the transition payload before and after each state change.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'refactor onboarding steps to include transition telemetry'

steps.title: Simulate Edge-Case Inputs
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate mock data that mimics users who skip steps or provide malformed inputs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of 10 edge-case JSON payloads that would likely break my current onboarding form validation logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'run validation tests against generated edge-case payloads'

steps.title: Optimize Debugging Feedback Loops
steps.description: Build an 'admin-view' toggle in your onboarding flow that displays the current application state for live debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a debug overlay component that displays the current Redux/Context state specifically for the onboarding module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/components/DebugOverlay.tsx --apply 'attach to onboarding state store'

pro_tips: Always log the 'previous state' alongside the 'error state' to see the exact delta that caused the crash.
Use mock user personas to test your onboarding flow; humans are unpredictable, but your test scripts shouldn't be.
If you can't debug it, simplify the component; if a function is too complex to debug, it's too complex to exist.
Leverage Claude Code's memory by providing it with the component's history before asking for a fix.
Treat your onboarding flow as a 'canary in the coal mine' for your entire app's stability.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is bulletproof, expand your debugging framework to your app's core data-processing modules using the same state-first methodology.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the methodology to stop guessing and start building with precision. Don't let a few bugs keep you from shipping your vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
